scenario.name: Caller receives anchored early media
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=early-caller-[call_number] To: <sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:1001@127.0.0.1:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 4 4 IN IP4 [media_ip] s=SIPp c=IN IP4 [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=early-caller-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:1002@pbx.example.invalid SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 127.0.0.1:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: <sip:1001@pbx.example.invalid>;tag=early-caller-[call_number] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
